_comment: Faroswap is Pharos's native DEX, forked from DODO. Uses DODO PMM (Proactive Market Maker). The router executes mixSwap calls with off-chain routed paths.

selectors._signature: mixSwap(address fromToken, address toToken, uint256 fromTokenAmount, uint256 expReturnAmount, uint256 minReturnAmount, address[] mixAdapters, address[] mixPairs, address[] assetTo, uint256 directions, bytes[] moreInfos, uint256 deadLine)

data.data: calldata, ready to send via cast
data.value: msg.value in wei for native token swaps

routeApi._note: API key required. Without it, agent must construct mixSwap params manually (only practical for direct PMM pools) — recommend fallback to direct token transfer + warning if no key available.
